issues.description: Action sequence is incorrect. The card text states 'You may trash 1 card... If you have 2 or less Life cards, play this Character card'. This is a conditional chain: trash → then check life condition → then play. Current DSL shows TrashFromHand with thenActions, but missing the life condition check before PlaySelf.
PlaySelf action missing required condition. Must add condition checking 'HasLifeOrLess:2' (you have 2 or less Life cards) before PlaySelf executes.
PlaySelf should specify 'rested:true' parameter since card is explicitly played rested according to card text.
